name: ca77y-engineering
description: Idea-to-shipped development pipeline as Claude Code subagents: researcher, analyst (shapes stories + records cards), lead (orchestrates a story across units — writes + validates specs, dispatches coders directly, runs the simplify pass), coder (builds one unit through its own qa/review/fix loop; also runs the story simplify pass), qa, writer, reviewer (native code review), auditor (native readiness audits + story acceptance), plus the native library crew — librarian, scribe, clerk — that maintains the project's Markdown research library in Claude.
